# ROLE

You are a Senior Full Stack Engineer and AI Systems Architect.

Build a complete production-quality solution for the following assessment.

The goal is to create a working Knowledge Capture Pipeline that converts doctor voice transcripts into validated knowledge graph nodes with conflict detection.

Do NOT provide explanations only.

Generate actual code, folder structure, implementation files, database schema, API endpoints, frontend components, prompts, and setup instructions.

---

# ASSESSMENT SUMMARY

Build a system:

Doctor Voice/Text
→ Transcript Review
→ LLM Knowledge Extraction
→ Confidence Routing
→ Embedding Generation
→ pgvector Similarity Search
→ Conflict Resolution
→ Knowledge Node Creation
→ Event Logging

Tech Stack:

Frontend:

* Next.js 15
* TypeScript
* Tailwind CSS

Backend:

* FastAPI
* Python 3.11

Database:

* Supabase PostgreSQL
* pgvector

AI:

* GPT-4o-mini or Gemini Flash
* text-embedding-3-small

---

# REQUIREMENTS

## Human In Loop #1

Doctor must review transcript before extraction.

Flow:

Paste transcript

Show editable textbox

Doctor edits transcript

Click:

Confirm & Extract

Extraction must never run before confirmation.

---

## LLM Knowledge Extraction

Given:

Transcript

Patient context nodes

Extract:

CONSTRAINT
DECISION
ANTI_PATTERN
FACT

Return:

[
{
"type":"",
"title":"",
"content":"",
"importance":0.9,
"confidence":0.8,
"suggested_level":"patient",
"department":"ortho",
"rationale":""
}
]

Use structured JSON output.

---

## Confidence Routing

Implement:

HIGH
confidence > 0.85

MEDIUM
0.60 - 0.85

LOW
< 0.60

Return routing tier.

---

## Human In Loop #2

HIGH

Auto Capture

Green Card

60 second undo timer

Button:

Undo

Status:

PENDING_CONFIRMATION

After 60 seconds:

ACTIVE

---

MEDIUM

Yellow Card

Buttons:

Confirm

Edit

Dismiss

---

LOW

Red Card

Editable form

Doctor must manually edit content

Dropdown:

CONSTRAINT

DECISION

ANTI_PATTERN

FACT

Buttons:

Save

Dismiss

---

All three tiers must have different UI designs.

---

## Conflict Detection

Generate embedding for candidate.

Search pgvector.

SQL:

SELECT
id,
title,
content,
1 - (embedding <=> candidate_embedding) similarity
FROM knowledge_nodes
ORDER BY embedding <=> candidate_embedding
LIMIT 5

Classification:

> 0.95
> DUPLICATE

0.85 - 0.95
UPDATE

0.70 - 0.85
COEXIST

< 0.70
NEW

Return:

{
"similarity":0.94,
"conflict_type":"DUPLICATE",
"existing_node":{}
}

---

## Conflict Resolution UI

Show:

Similarity score

Existing node

Candidate node

Buttons:

Merge

Update

Keep Both

Dismiss

---

## Node Creation

Insert into:

knowledge_nodes

Insert event into:

event_log

---

## Event Logging

Every action must be logged.

Examples:

CAPTURE_DETECTED

CAPTURE_CONFIRMED

CAPTURE_DISMISSED

CAPTURE_MERGED

CAPTURE_UPDATED

CAPTURE_UNDONE

---

## Database

Use Supabase.

Include:

organizations

users

patients

knowledge_nodes

capture_candidates

event_log

Generate SQL migration files.

---

## Embeddings

Use:

text-embedding-3-small

Create:

scripts/generate_embeddings.py

Generate embeddings for seed data.

---

## API ENDPOINTS

POST /extract

POST /detect-conflicts

POST /confirm-node

POST /dismiss-node

POST /merge-node

GET /patient-context/{patient_id}

GET /capture-summary

Generate full FastAPI implementation.

---

## FRONTEND COMPONENTS

Create:

TranscriptInput.tsx

TranscriptReview.tsx

ExtractionResults.tsx

AutoCaptureCard.tsx

ReviewCard.tsx

ExplicitInputCard.tsx

ConflictPanel.tsx

CaptureSummary.tsx

PatientSelector.tsx

DoctorSelector.tsx

Generate full TypeScript code.

---

## FOLDER STRUCTURE

Generate complete folder structure.

Example:

backend/
frontend/
scripts/
docs/
supabase/

---

## ARCHITECTURE DOCUMENT

Create:

docs/architecture.md

Explain:

Extraction pipeline

Confidence routing

Conflict thresholds

Undo mechanism

Human review workflow

Scalability to 10,000+ nodes

pgvector indexing strategy

---

## README

Generate complete README.

Include:

Setup

Environment Variables

Running Backend

Running Frontend

Loading Seed Data

Generating Embeddings

Testing Scenarios

Demo Steps

---

## DATA SOURCES

Generate:

data_sources.md

Document all clinical information sources used.

---

## TEST SCENARIOS

Implement support for:

Ramaiah transcript

Aadhya transcript

No-change transcript

Show expected outputs.

---

# OUTPUT FORMAT

Generate project one section at a time.

Start with:

1. Folder Structure
2. Backend Implementation
3. Database Schema
4. Embedding Script
5. Frontend Components
6. API Integration
7. Architecture.md
8. README.md
9. data_sources.md

Provide complete code.

Do not skip files.

Do not use placeholders.

Generate production-ready code.

     1→# OpenAPI Spec & Codegen
     2→
     3→`lib/api-spec/openapi.yaml` is the single source of truth for all API contracts. Define endpoints here first, then generate typed helpers.
     4→
     5→## Codegen
     6→
     7→```bash
     8→pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen
     9→```
    10→
    11→This produces:
    12→
    13→- Zod validation schemas in `@workspace/api-zod` (used by the server)
    14→- React Query hooks in `@workspace/api-client-react` (used by frontends)
    15→
    16→Re-run codegen after every spec change. Do not hand-write types that the codegen already produces.
    17→
    18→After codegen, Orval writes to fixed paths:
    19→
    20→```text
    21→lib/api-client-react/src/generated/api.ts
    22→lib/api-client-react/src/generated/api.schemas.ts
    23→lib/api-zod/src/generated/api.ts
    24→```
    25→
    26→## Writing the spec
    27→
    28→- Base server URL is `/api`. Do not change this.
    29→- Keep the existing `/healthz` endpoint and `HealthStatus` schema.
    30→- Every endpoint must have an `operationId` — Orval uses these to derive hook and schema names.
    31→- Put every request/update body in `components/schemas` and `$ref` it from the operation. Use entity-shaped names (`NoteInput`, `NoteUpdate`, `ItemInput`) — never operation-shaped names like `CreateNoteBody` or `UpdateNoteBody`, and never inline the body. See "Body schema naming" below.
    32→- For array responses, define the item schema separately under `components/schemas` and reference it with `type: array` + `items: { $ref: ... }`.
    33→- For nullable fields use `type: ["<actual_type>", "null"]` (OpenAPI 3.1), where `<actual_type>` is the real type of the field (`string`, `integer`, `number`, `boolean`, etc.). For example: `type: ["integer", "null"]` for a nullable number.
    34→- The workspace Orval config forces `info.title` to `Api` so generated outputs stay at the fixed `generated/api*` filenames. Do not fight that convention or hand-rename the generated files/barrels.
    35→
    36→## Body schema naming (avoid TS2308 collisions)
    37→
    38→Every request/update body **must** live in `components/schemas` and be `$ref`'d from the operation. The component name **must not** match `<OperationIdPascal>Body` (the name Orval auto-derives). Use entity-shaped names (`NoteInput`, `NoteUpdate`, `ItemInput`).
    39→
    40→Why: For each operation with a body, Orval emits a Zod schema to `generated/api.ts` named `<OperationIdPascal>Body` (e.g. `createNote` → `CreateNoteBody`). It separately emits TypeScript interfaces for everything reachable as a body schema into `generated/types/`. The `lib/api-zod` barrel re-exports both with `export *`. If those two names collide, you get:
    41→
    42→```text
    43→error TS2308: Module "./generated/api" has already exported a member named 'CreateNoteBody'.
    44→```
    45→
    46→The build fails after codegen during `pnpm -w run typecheck:libs`. Orval itself succeeds — only the chained typecheck blows up, so the failure looks like a codegen error but is really a downstream typecheck error.
    47→
    48→The collision happens in two ways, both avoidable:
    49→
    50→1. **Inline body** — Orval invents `<OperationIdPascal>Body` as the TS type name for the inline shape and emits it to `generated/types/`. Always collides with the Zod schema of the same name in `api.ts`.
    51→2. **`$ref` to a component named `<OperationIdPascal>Body`** — same name in both files. Same collision.
    52→
    53→The single rule that avoids both: **`$ref` every body, and name the component after the entity, not the operation.**
    54→
    55→### Right pattern
    56→
    57→```yaml
    58→paths:
    59→  /notes:
    60→    post:
    61→      operationId: createNote
    62→      requestBody:
    63→        required: true
    64→        content:
    65→          application/json:
    66→            schema:
    67→              $ref: "#/components/schemas/NoteInput"   # entity-shaped name
    68→      responses:
    69→        "201":
    70→          description: Created
    71→          content:
    72→            application/json:
    73→              schema:
    74→                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Note"
    75→    patch:
    76→      operationId: updateNote
    77→      requestBody:
    78→        required: true
    79→        content:
    80→          application/json:

# MedCapture — Knowledge Capture Pipeline

A clinical knowledge capture system that converts doctor voice transcripts into validated knowledge graph nodes with confidence-based routing, pgvector-style similarity conflict detection, and human-in-the-loop review.

## Run & Operate

- `pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev` — run the API server (port 8080)
- `pnpm --filter @workspace/knowledge-pipeline run dev` — run the frontend (port 19213)
- `pnpm run typecheck` — full typecheck across all packages
- `pnpm run build` — typecheck + build all packages
- `pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen` — regenerate API hooks and Zod schemas from the OpenAPI spec
- `pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push` — push DB schema changes (dev only)
- Required env: `DATABASE_URL` — Postgres connection string
- Required env: `OPENAI_API_KEY` — OpenAI key for GPT-4o-mini extraction + text-embedding-3-small

## Stack

- pnpm workspaces, Node.js 24, TypeScript 5.9
- Frontend: React + Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, TanStack Query, wouter
- API: Express 5
- DB: PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM
- AI: OpenAI GPT-4o-mini (extraction) + text-embedding-3-small (embeddings)
- Validation: Zod (`zod/v4`), `drizzle-zod`
- API codegen: Orval (from OpenAPI spec)
- Build: esbuild (CJS bundle)

## Where things live

- `lib/api-spec/openapi.yaml` — API contract (source of truth)
- `lib/db/src/schema/` — Drizzle table schemas (patients, doctors, knowledge-nodes, capture-candidates, event-log)
- `artifacts/api-server/src/routes/` — Express route handlers
- `artifacts/api-server/src/lib/openai.ts` — OpenAI client (extraction + embeddings)
- `artifacts/knowledge-pipeline/src/pages/` — Frontend pages (dashboard, pipeline, knowledge, events)
- `artifacts/knowledge-pipeline/src/components/` — UI components (confidence tier cards, conflict panel, selectors)

## Architecture decisions

- Embeddings stored as JSON-serialized `number[]` in a `text` column — avoids pgvector extension dependency while retaining full cosine similarity computation in Node
- Confidence tiers (HIGH >0.85, MEDIUM 0.60-0.85, LOW <0.60) gate UI behavior: HIGH auto-captures with 60s undo, MEDIUM needs confirmation, LOW requires manual edit
- Conflict thresholds: DUPLICATE >0.95, UPDATE 0.85-0.95, COEXIST 0.70-0.85, NEW <0.70
- Human-in-the-loop #1: transcript must be confirmed before extraction fires (button-gated, not automatic)
- Human-in-the-loop #2: all three tiers have distinct UI designs enforcing appropriate review depth

## Product

- **Dashboard** — capture summary stats, recent activity, type/department distribution
- **Capture Pipeline** — patient+doctor selector → transcript input → tiered card review → conflict resolution
- **Knowledge Graph** — searchable/filterable list of all knowledge nodes
- **Event Log** — immutable audit trail of all capture actions

## User preferences

_Populate as you build — explicit user instructions worth remembering across sessions._

## Gotchas

- Run `pnpm run typecheck:libs` after schema changes before running `pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run typecheck`
- The `openai` package is in `dependencies` (not devDependencies) of `@workspace/api-server`
- Express 5 route handlers need explicit `return` statements or TypeScript reports TS7030

## Pointers

- See the `pnpm-workspace` skill for workspace structure, TypeScript setup, and package details

=== END ===

openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  # Do not change the title, if the title changes, the import paths will be broken
  title: Api
  version: 0.1.0
  description: Knowledge Capture Pipeline API
servers:
  - url: /api
    description: Base API path
tags:
  - name: health
    description: Health operations
  - name: patients
    description: Patient operations
  - name: doctors
    description: Doctor operations
  - name: knowledge
    description: Knowledge node operations
  - name: capture
    description: Capture candidate operations
  - name: events
    description: Event log operations
  - name: transcribe
    description: Audio transcription operations

paths:
  /transcribe:
    post:
      operationId: transcribeAudio
      tags: [transcribe]
      summary: Transcribe audio to text using Whisper
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [audio]
              properties:
                audio:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Transcription result
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TranscriptionResult"
        "400":
          description: Bad request

  /healthz:
    get:
      operationId: healthCheck
      tags: [health]
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HealthStatus"

  /patients:
    get:
      operationId: listPatients
      tags: [patients]
      summary: List all patients
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of patients
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Patient"

  /patients/{patientId}/context:
    get:
      operationId: getPatientContext
      tags: [patients]
      summary: Get patient context nodes
      parameters:
        - name: patientId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Patient context
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/PatientContext"

  /doctors/{doctorId}/context:
    get:
      operationId: getDoctorContext
      tags: [doctors]
      summary: Get doctor context — their nodes and stats
      parameters:
        - name: doctorId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Doctor context
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/DoctorContext"
        "404":
          description: Doctor not found

  /doctors:
    get:
      operationId: listDoctors
      tags: [doctors]
      summary: List all doctors
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of doctors
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Doctor"

  /extract:
    post:
      operationId: extractKnowledge
      tags: [capture]
      summary: Extract knowledge nodes from transcript using LLM
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExtractInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Extracted candidates
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/CaptureCandidate"

  /detect-conflicts:
    post:
      operationId: detectConflicts
      tags: [capture]
      summary: Generate embedding and detect conflicts via cosine similarity search
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConflictDetectInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Conflict detection result
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConflictResult"

  /confirm-node:
    post:
      operationId: confirmNode
      tags: [capture]
      summary: Confirm and create a knowledge node
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConfirmNodeInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created knowledge node
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNode"

  /dismiss-node:
    post:
      operationId: dismissNode
      tags: [capture]
      summary: Dismiss a capture candidate

        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/DismissNodeInput"

        "200":

        "200":
          description: Merged knowledge node
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNode"

  /undo-node:
    post:
      operationId: undoNode

        required: true
        content:

            application/json:
              schema:

  /knowledge-nodes:

        - name: doctorId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
        - name: department
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["string", "null"]
        - name: type
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["string", "null"]
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["string", "null"]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of knowledge nodes
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNode"

  /knowledge-nodes/{nodeId}:

      operationId: getKnowledgeNode
      tags: [knowledge]
      summary: Get a single knowledge node
      parameters:
        - name: nodeId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Knowledge node
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNode"
    patch:
      operationId: updateKnowledgeNode
      tags: [knowledge]
      summary: Update a knowledge node
      parameters:
        - name: nodeId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNodeUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated node
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNode"

  /capture-summary:
    get:
      operationId: getCaptureSummary
      tags: [capture]
      summary: Get dashboard summary of capture pipeline stats
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Summary stats
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CaptureSummary"

  /events:
    get:
      operationId: listEvents
      tags: [events]
      summary: List recent event log entries
      parameters:
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Event log
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/EventLog"

components:

  specialization: "DESIGN",
  task: `Build the full frontend for MedCapture — a clinical Knowledge Capture Pipeline used by doctors and clinical staff to convert voice transcripts into structured, validated knowledge graph nodes.

**Product identity:** A precision tool for clinical knowledge management — every element earns its place. Doctors trust this with patient safety data; it should feel authoritative, controlled, and efficient. Dense but organized, with a cockpit-like clarity where each action is exactly where you expect it.

**Vibe:** Tight and clinical — like a well-lit operating theater. Purpose-driven without being cold. Information is layered: what matters most is immediately visible, secondary details appear when needed. Users spend hours here; reward them with thoughtful details and satisfying micro-interactions.

**Pages (use wouter for routing):**
- \`/\` — Dashboard: pipeline health at a glance, today's capture activity, recent events feed, node counts by type and department
- \`/pipeline\` — Capture pipeline: record/upload audio, review transcript (Human-in-loop #1), trigger extraction, then review extracted candidates in tiered review UI (Human-in-loop #2). HIGH confidence nodes (>0.85) auto-capture with a 60s undo. MEDIUM (0.60-0.85) require confirm/edit/dismiss. LOW (<0.60) require manual edit before confirming. Each candidate shows conflict detection (DUPLICATE/UPDATE/COEXIST/NEW) with the conflicting node.
- \`/knowledge\` — Knowledge graph browser: filter/search active knowledge nodes by type (CONSTRAINT/DECISION/ANTI_PATTERN/FACT), department, patient, confidence. Edit node content inline.
- \`/events\` — Event log: timeline of all pipeline events (CAPTURE_DETECTED, CAPTURE_CONFIRMED, CAPTURE_DISMISSED, CAPTURE_MERGED, CAPTURE_UNDONE) with metadata.

**Data types:**

Patient: { id, name, mrn, dateOfBirth, department, createdAt }
Doctor: { id, name, specialty, email, createdAt }

KnowledgeNode: {
  id, type (CONSTRAINT|DECISION|ANTI_PATTERN|FACT), title, content,
  importance (0-1), confidence (0-1), status (ACTIVE|PENDING_CONFIRMATION|DISMISSED),
  level (patient|department|organization), department, rationale,
  patientId, doctorId, createdAt, updatedAt
}

CaptureCandidate: {
  id, type, title, content, importance, confidence,
  confidenceTier (HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW), suggestedLevel,
  department, rationale, patientId, doctorId, status (PENDING|CONFIRMED|DISMISSED|MERGED),
  createdAt
}

EventLog: { id, eventType, candidateId, nodeId, doctorId, patientId, metadata, createdAt }

ConflictDetectionResult: { candidateId, conflictType (NEW|COEXIST|UPDATE|DUPLICATE), similarity, existingNode }

CaptureSummary: { totalNodes, activeNodes, pendingNodes, todayCaptures, byType: [{label,count}], byDepartment: [{label,count}], recentActivity: [EventLog] }

**Available API hooks (import from \`@workspace/api-client-react\`):**

Queries:
- useHealthCheck()
- useListPatients()
- useGetPatientContext(patientId, options)  // getGetPatientContextQueryKey(patientId)
- useListDoctors()
- useGetDoctorContext(doctorId, options)  // getGetDoctorContextQueryKey(doctorId)
- useListKnowledgeNodes(params?, options)  // params: { patientId?, doctorId?, department?, type?, status? }, getListKnowledgeNodesQueryKey(params)
- useGetKnowledgeNode(nodeId, options)  // getGetKnowledgeNodeQueryKey(nodeId)
- useGetCaptureSummary()  // getGetCaptureSummaryQueryKey()
- useListEvents(params?, options)  // params: { limit? }, getListEventsQueryKey(params)

Mutations:
- useExtractKnowledge()  // mutate({ data: { transcript, patientId, doctorId } }) → CaptureCandidate[]
- useDetectConflicts()  // mutate({ data: { candidateId } }) → ConflictDetectionResult
- useConfirmNode()  // mutate({ data: { candidateId, editedType?, editedTitle?, editedContent?, editedRationale? } }) → KnowledgeNode
- useDismissNode()  // mutate({ data: { candidateId } }) → { success, message }
- useMergeNode()  // mutate({ data: { candidateId, existingNodeId, mergedContent? } }) → KnowledgeNode
- useUndoNode()  // mutate({ data: { nodeId } }) → { success, message }  (60s window)
- useUpdateKnowledgeNode()  // mutate({ nodeId, data: { type?, title?, content?, importance?, rationale? } }) → KnowledgeNode

Note: The transcribe endpoint (/api/transcribe) is a multipart POST — call it with fetch directly using FormData (audio file → field "audio"), not via a generated hook.

arguments.content:
# MedCapture — Knowledge Pipeline

A clinical knowledge capture pipeline that converts doctor voice transcripts into validated knowledge graph nodes via LLM extraction, confidence routing, and human-in-the-loop review.

## Run & Operate

- `pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev` — run the API server (port 8080, proxied at `/api`)
- `pnpm --filter @workspace/knowledge-pipeline run dev` — run the frontend (port 19213, proxied at `/`)
- `pnpm run typecheck` — full typecheck across all packages
- `pnpm run build` — typecheck + build all packages
- `pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen` — regenerate API hooks and Zod schemas from the OpenAPI spec
- `pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push` — push DB schema changes (dev only)
- Required env: `DATABASE_URL` — Postgres connection string (auto-set by Replit DB)
- Required env: `OPENAI_API_KEY` — for GPT-4o-mini extraction + text-embedding-3-small + Whisper transcription

## Stack

- pnpm workspaces, Node.js 24, TypeScript 5.9
- API: Express 5
- DB: PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM
- Validation: Zod (`zod/v4`), `drizzle-zod`
- API codegen: Orval (from OpenAPI spec)
- Build: esbuild (CJS bundle)
- Frontend: React + Vite + shadcn/ui + Tailwind + wouter + TanStack Query
- AI: OpenAI GPT-4o-mini (extraction), text-embedding-3-small (embeddings), Whisper (transcription)

## Where things live

- `lib/api-spec/openapi.yaml` — source-of-truth API contract
- `lib/db/src/schema/` — Drizzle ORM table definitions
- `artifacts/api-server/src/routes/` — Express route handlers
- `artifacts/api-server/src/lib/openai.ts` — OpenAI client (lazy init), embedding, extraction
- `artifacts/knowledge-pipeline/src/` — React frontend

## Architecture decisions

- **Embeddings as JSON text**: `text-embedding-3-small` vectors stored as JSON-serialized `number[]` in a `text` column. No pgvector extension required; cosine similarity computed in Node.js.
- **Confidence tiers**: HIGH >0.85 (auto-capture + 60s undo window), MEDIUM 0.60–0.85 (confirm/edit/dismiss UI), LOW <0.60 (manual edit required).
- **Conflict types via cosine similarity**: DUPLICATE >0.95, UPDATE 0.85–0.95, COEXIST 0.70–0.85, NEW <0.70.
- **OpenAI lazy init**: `getClient()` in `openai.ts` initializes the client on first call so the server starts without `OPENAI_API_KEY` being set (key only required for actual AI operations).
- **Contract-first**: OpenAPI spec → codegen → typed hooks on frontend and Zod schemas on backend. Never hand-write types that codegen produces.

## Product

- **Dashboard** (`/`): pipeline health at a glance — node counts, today's captures, breakdown by type/department, recent event feed.
- **Pipeline** (`/pipeline`): record or upload audio → Whisper transcription → GPT-4o-mini extraction → tiered review UI (Human-in-loop). HIGH confidence nodes auto-capture with 60s undo. MEDIUM nodes show confirm/edit/dismiss. Conflict detection shows similarity to existing nodes.
- **Knowledge Graph** (`/knowledge`): browse/filter active nodes by type, department, status. Inline editing.
- **Event Log** (`/events`): full audit trail of all pipeline events with metadata.

## User preferences

_Populate as you build — explicit user instructions worth remembering across sessions._

## Gotchas

- `OPENAI_API_KEY` must be set as a Replit Secret for extraction, embedding, and transcription to work. Without it the server starts but AI routes return a 500.
- DB schema is managed via `pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push` (dev). Production schema migrations are handled by Replit's Publish flow — never write migration scripts.
- Audio transcription (`POST /api/transcribe`) uses multipart form upload — no generated hook, call with `fetch` + `FormData`.

## Pointers

- See the `pnpm-workspace` skill for workspace structure, TypeScript setup, and package details

arguments.content:
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  # Do not change the title, if the title changes, the import paths will be broken
  title: Api
  version: 0.1.0
  description: Knowledge Capture Pipeline API
servers:
  - url: /api
    description: Base API path
tags:
  - name: health
    description: Health operations
  - name: patients
    description: Patient operations
  - name: doctors
    description: Doctor operations
  - name: knowledge
    description: Knowledge node operations
  - name: capture
    description: Capture candidate operations
  - name: events
    description: Event log operations

paths:
  /healthz:
    get:
      operationId: healthCheck
      tags: [health]
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HealthStatus"

  /patients:
    get:
      operationId: listPatients
      tags: [patients]
      summary: List all patients
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of patients
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Patient"
    post:
      operationId: createPatient
      tags: [patients]
      summary: Create a new patient
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/PatientInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created patient
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Patient"

  /patients/{patientId}/context:
    get:
      operationId: getPatientContext
      tags: [patients]
      summary: Get patient context nodes
      parameters:
        - name: patientId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Patient context
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/PatientContext"

  /doctors:
    get:
      operationId: listDoctors
      tags: [doctors]
      summary: List all doctors
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of doctors
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Doctor"
    post:
      operationId: createDoctor
      tags: [doctors]
      summary: Create a new doctor
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/DoctorInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created doctor
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Doctor"

  /doctors/{doctorId}/context:
    get:
      operationId: getDoctorContext
      tags: [doctors]
      summary: Get doctor context — their nodes and stats
      parameters:
        - name: doctorId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Doctor context
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/DoctorContext"
        "404":
          description: Doctor not found

  /extract:
    post:
      operationId: extractKnowledge
      tags: [capture]
      summary: Extract knowledge nodes from transcript using LLM
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExtractInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Extracted candidates
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/CaptureCandidate"

  /detect-conflicts:
    post:
      operationId: detectConflicts
      tags: [capture]
      summary: Generate embedding and detect conflicts via cosine similarity search
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConflictDetectInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Conflict detection result
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConflictResult"

  /confirm-node:
    post:
      operationId: confirmNode
      tags: [capture]
      summary: Confirm and create a knowledge node
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConfirmNodeInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created knowledge node
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNode"

  /dismiss-node:
    post:
      operationId: dismissNode
      tags: [capture]
      summary: Dismiss a capture candidate
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/DismissNodeInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Dismissed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionResult"

  /merge-node:
    post:
      operationId: mergeNode
      tags: [capture]
      summary: Merge candidate with existing knowledge node
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/MergeNodeInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Merged knowledge node
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNode"

  /undo-node:
    post:
      operationId: undoNode
      tags: [capture]
      summary: Undo an auto-captured node within the 60-second window
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UndoNodeInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Undone
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionResult"

  /knowledge-nodes:
    get:
      operationId: listKnowledgeNodes
      tags: [knowledge]
      summary: List knowledge nodes with optional filters
      parameters:
        - name: patientId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
        - name: doctorId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
        - name: department
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["string", "null"]
        - name: type
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["string", "null"]
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["string", "null"]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of knowledge nodes
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNode"

  /knowledge-nodes/{nodeId}:
    get:
      operationId: getKnowledgeNode
      tags: [knowledge]
      summary: Get a single knowledge node
      parameters:
        - name: nodeId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Knowledge node
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNode"
    patch:
      operationId: updateKnowledgeNode
      tags: [knowledge]
      summary: Update a knowledge node
      parameters:
        - name: nodeId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNodeUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated node
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNode"

  /capture-summary:
    get:
      operationId: getCaptureSummary
      tags: [capture]
      summary: Get dashboard summary of capture pipeline stats
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Summary stats
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CaptureSummary"

  /events:
    get:
      operationId: listEvents
      tags: [events]
      summary: List recent event log entries
      parameters:
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Event log
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/EventLog"

components:
  schemas:
    HealthStatus:
      type: object
      required: [status]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string

    Patient:
      type: object
      required: [id, name, mrn]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        mrn:
          type: string
        dateOfBirth:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        department:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        createdAt:
          type: string

    PatientInput:
      type: object
      required: [name, mrn]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          minLength: 1
        mrn:
          type: string
          minLength: 1
        dateOfBirth:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        department:
          type: ["string", "null"]

    Doctor:
      type: object
      required: [id, name]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        specialty:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        email:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        createdAt:
          type: string

    DoctorInput:
      type: object
      required: [name]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          minLength: 1
        specialty:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        email:
          type: ["string", "null"]

    PatientContext:
      type: object
      required: [patient, knowledgeNodes]
      properties:
        patient:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Patient"
        knowledgeNodes:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNode"

    KnowledgeNode:
      type: object
      required: [id, type, title, content, importance, confidence, status, level, department]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [CONSTRAINT, DECISION, ANTI_PATTERN, FACT]
        title:
          type: string
        content:
          type: string
        importance:
          type: number
        confidence:
          type: number
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [PENDING_CONFIRMATION, ACTIVE, DISMISSED, MERGED]
        level:
          type: string
          enum: [patient, department, organization]
        department:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        rationale:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        patientId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        doctorId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        createdAt:
          type: string
        updatedAt:
          type: string

    KnowledgeNodeUpdate:
      type: object
      properties:
        type:
          type: ["string", "null"]
          enum: [CONSTRAINT, DECISION, ANTI_PATTERN, FACT, null]
        title:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        content:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        importance:
          type: ["number", "null"]
        rationale:
          type: ["string", "null"]

    CaptureCandidate:
      type: object
      required: [id, type, title, content, importance, confidence, confidenceTier, suggestedLevel, department, rationale, patientId, doctorId]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [CONSTRAINT, DECISION, ANTI_PATTERN, FACT]
        title:
          type: string
        content:
          type: string
        importance:
          type: number
        confidence:
          type: number
        confidenceTier:
          type: string
          enum: [HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW]
        suggestedLevel:
          type: string
          enum: [patient, department, organization]
        department:
          type: string
        rationale:
          type: string
        patientId:
          type: integer
        doctorId:
          type: integer
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [PENDING, CONFIRMED, DISMISSED, MERGED]
        createdAt:
          type: string

    ExtractInput:
      type: object
      required: [transcript, patientId, doctorId]
      properties:
        transcript:
          type: string
        patientId:
          type: integer
        doctorId:
          type: integer

    ConflictDetectInput:
      type: object
      required: [candidateId]
      properties:
        candidateId:
          type: integer

    ConflictResult:
      type: object
      required: [candidateId, conflictType, similarity]
      properties:
        candidateId:
          type: integer
        conflictType:
          type: string
          enum: [NEW, COEXIST, UPDATE, DUPLICATE]
        similarity:
          type: number
        existingNode:
          type: ["object", "null"]

    ConfirmNodeInput:
      type: object
      required: [candidateId]
      properties:
        candidateId:
          type: integer
        editedType:
          type: ["string", "null"]
          enum: [CONSTRAINT, DECISION, ANTI_PATTERN, FACT, null]
        editedTitle:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        editedContent:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        editedRationale:
          type: ["string", "null"]

    DismissNodeInput:
      type: object
      required: [candidateId]
      properties:
        candidateId:
          type: integer

    MergeNodeInput:
      type: object
      required: [candidateId, existingNodeId]
      properties:
        candidateId:
          type: integer
        existingNodeId:
          type: integer
        mergedContent:
          type: ["string", "null"]

    UndoNodeInput:
      type: object
      required: [nodeId]
      properties:
        nodeId:
          type: integer

    CaptureSummary:
      type: object
      required: [totalNodes, activeNodes, pendingNodes, todayCaptures, byType, byDepartment, recentActivity]
      properties:
        totalNodes:
          type: integer
        activeNodes:
          type: integer
        pendingNodes:
          type: integer
        todayCaptures:
          type: integer
        byType:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CountByLabel"
        byDepartment:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CountByLabel"
        recentActivity:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/EventLog"

    CountByLabel:
      type: object
      required: [label, count]
      properties:
        label:
          type: string
        count:
          type: integer

    EventLog:
      type: object
      required: [id, eventType, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        eventType:
          type: string
        candidateId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        nodeId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        doctorId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        patientId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        metadata:
          type: ["object", "null"]
        createdAt:
          type: string

    DoctorContext:
      type: object
      required: [doctor, knowledgeNodes]
      properties:
        doctor:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Doctor"
        knowledgeNodes:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/KnowledgeNode"

    ActionResult:
      type: object
      required: [success, message]
      properties:
        success:
          type: boolean
        message:
          type: string

    TranscriptionResult:
      type: object
      required: [transcript]
      properties:
        transcript:
          type: string
